statement: Replacing list-everything patterns with per-entity queries (e.g., using or replacing `getWindowSummary`) will reduce Lab payloads and eliminate N+1 work in `listEvidenceWindows`.
rationale: `listEvidenceWindows` loops per-window to compute counts, and evidence detail fetches the full list just to pick one window.
keyAssumptions: Window detail pages only need a single window summary
validationCriteria: Performance metrics show reduced queries per page
Lab UI still renders correct window details
critiquePoints: Some pages may rely on the full list for navigation
questions: Do any Lab screens require the full window list on load?
